testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Candidates responsible for participating in all phases of development, including requirements gathering, design, development, deployment, security, maintenance, performance tuning, and monitoring.
recommended_experience: At least two years of programming experience. Proficiency in programming with Azure SDKs. Proficiency using Azure CLI, Azure PowerShell, and other tools.

prerequisites.description: At least two years of programming experience.
Proficiency in programming with Azure SDKs.
Proficiency using Azure CLI, Azure PowerShell, and other tools.

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Implement containerized solutions
sub_objectives: Create and manage container images for solutions
Publish an image to Azure Container Registry
Run containers by using Azure Container Instances
Create solutions by using Azure Container Apps

objectives.title: Implement Azure App Service Web Apps
sub_objectives: Create an Azure App Service Web App
Configure and implement diagnostics and logging
Deploy code and containerized solutions
Configure settings including Transport Layer Security (TLS), API settings, and service connections
Implement autoscaling
Configure deployment slots

objectives.title: Implement Azure Functions
sub_objectives: Create and configure an Azure Functions app
Implement input and output bindings
Implement function triggers by using data operations, timers, and webhooks

objectives.title: Develop solutions that use Azure Cosmos DB
sub_objectives: Perform operations on containers and items by using the SDK
Set the appropriate consistency level for operations
Implement change feed notifications

objectives.title: Develop solutions that use Azure Blob Storage
sub_objectives: Set and retrieve properties and metadata
Perform operations on data by using the appropriate SDK
Implement storage policies and data lifecycle management

objectives.title: Implement user authentication and authorization
sub_objectives: Authenticate and authorize users by using the Microsoft Identity platform
Authenticate and authorize users and apps by using Microsoft Entra ID
Create and implement shared access signatures
Implement solutions that interact with Microsoft Graph

objectives.title: Implement secure Azure solutions
sub_objectives: Secure app configuration data by using Azure App Configuration or Azure Key Vault
Develop code that uses keys, secrets, and certificates stored in Azure Key Vault
Implement Managed Identities for Azure resources

domains.name: Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize Azure solutions

objectives.title: Monitor and troubleshoot Azure solutions
sub_objectives: Monitor and troubleshoot solutions by using Azure Monitor Application Insights
Monitor and analyze metrics, logs, and traces
Implement availability tests and alerts
Instrument an app or service to use Application Insights

domains.name: Connect to and consume Azure services and third-party services

objectives.title: Implement Azure API Management
sub_objectives: Create an Azure API Management instance
Create and document APIs
Configure access to APIs
Implement policies for APIs

objectives.title: Develop event-based solutions
sub_objectives: Implement solutions that use Azure Event Grid
Implement solutions that use Azure Event Hubs

objectives.title: Develop message-based solutions
sub_objectives: Implement solutions that use Azure Service Bus
Implement solutions that use Azure Queue Storage

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Learn (free self-paced training)
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning paths mapped to each exam

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Official Practice Assessment
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice questions on Microsoft Learn
